name: underdark-outpost
summary: A fortified stop on an Underdark trade route — chitin-and-stone palisade, a banked watchfire, bedrolls and supply crates for travelers who trust no one.

primary_palette.note: banked fire ringed by watch positions
captain's planning table with Underdark charts

story_prompts: mind flayer diplomats pass through — everyone pretends not to notice
the captain is dying from a hook horror wound and won't admit it
a svirfneblin caravan trades gems for surface grain
raided last night — survivors rebuilding the barrier

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: dim (0.15-0.2) firelight plus cold lantern pools

anti_patterns: don't make it tidy — this is a hard-scrabble waypoint, not a garrison
barriers cluster at choke points, not evenly along walls
leave sightlines from the map-table to every entry
